When one of us is sad, help the rest of us be the comfort.
Help us to be patient with each other, even on grumpy days.
Make our home a place full of kind words and big laughs.
One thing I love about our family is ______.
Keep us loving each other no matter what happens.
togetherLine: As for our family, we will serve the Lord! Amen.

title: A Fresh-Start Prayer
lines: Dear God, thank You for forgiving us every single time we ask.
Thank You for Jesus, who makes forgiveness possible.
Help us forgive each other the way You forgive us.
We are sorry for the unkind words and the selfish moments.
Thank You for never turning us away when we say sorry.
God, help me say sorry to ______ tomorrow.
Keep our family quick to repair what gets broken between us.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for fresh starts! Amen.

title: A Brave-Heart Prayer
lines: Dear God, You tell us, "Do not be afraid, for I am with you." Thank You.
Fear is loud, but Your love is stronger.
Help us trust You more than we trust our worries.
When we feel small, remind us how big You are.
When we feel alone, remind us You never leave.
Help me be brave enough to ______ this week.
Turn our worries into prayers the moment they show up.
togetherLine: Be strong and courageous — God is with us! Amen.

title: A Kind-Heart Prayer
lines: Dear God, You are kind to us every day. Help us pass it on.
Kindness is love everyone can see.
Let people see Your love in the small things we do.
Give us eyes that notice when someone is sad or left out.
Give us feet that walk over and hearts that care.
One kind thing I can do tomorrow is ______.
Help us be kind even to people who are not kind to us.
togetherLine: Be kind to one another — starting with us! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Others
lines: Dear God, tonight we pray not for ourselves, but for others.
We pray for people with no home and no family nearby.
Show them they are not forgotten — not by You, not by us.
We pray for kids who are hungry, lonely, or scared tonight.
Send them helpers, and make us helpers too.
God, show our family how to help ______.
Use our hands, our snacks, our dollars, and our time however You want.
togetherLine: Make us helpers, God! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Trust
lines: Dear God, we put our whole family in Your hands tonight.
Even when life feels stormy, You are our safe place.
Help us remember whose hands are holding us.
When we worry, remind us to pray instead.
Trade our heavy worries for Your light peace.
Today You took care of me by ______. Thank You.
Give us peaceful sleep tonight, because You stay awake watching over us.
togetherLine: We trust You, God! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Learning
lines: Dear God, thank You for our growing brains and everything they can learn.
Thank You that we never stop learning, kids and grown-ups alike.
Most of all, help us learn more about You.
Bless our teachers and helpers — give them patience and joy.
Help us listen well and try our best.
God, something cool I learned recently is ______.
Make us hard workers who do everything like we are doing it for You.
togetherLine: Help us grow wiser and kinder every day! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Friends
lines: Dear God, thank You for friends — what a wonderful idea You had!
Help us notice kids who do not have a friend yet.
Give us courage to be their first one.
Bless our friends tonight, at their own houses, with their own families.
Keep them safe and let them know You love them.
Help me be a better friend by ______.
Thank You for being our best friend of all, Jesus.
togetherLine: A friend loves at all times! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Wonder
lines: Dear God, You made everything — and everything You made is amazing.
Thank You for making each of us wonderfully, on purpose, one of a kind.
Help us believe we are Your masterpiece.
Thank You for animals — the fast ones, the fluffy ones, the funny ones.
You must have smiled when You made them.
Today in Your world I noticed ______.
Thank You for making people the most special creation of all.
togetherLine: You made it all, and it is very good! Amen.

title: A Happy-Heart Prayer
lines: Dear God, today we just want to tell You how great You are!
Angels praise You, oceans roar for You, and little kids sing to You.
We join the big song right now!
You are good all the time — morning, noon, and night.
Nothing and nobody is greater than You.
If my heart had a song today, it would be about ______.
Let our family's laughter be a kind of thank-You to You.
togetherLine: This is the day the Lord has made — we will rejoice! Amen.

title: A Slow-Down Prayer
lines: Dear God, You are so patient with us. Help us be patient too.
Thank You for being patient with us when we make the same mistake again.
Help us be that patient with each other.
Help us be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to get angry.
Put a little pause between our feelings and our words.
When I feel impatient, help me ______ instead.
Help us give each other time to grow, the way You give us time.
togetherLine: Quick to listen, slow to anger! Amen.

title: A Quiet-Heart Prayer
lines: Dear God, as this day winds down, we bring You our whole selves.
Thank You for Sabbath moments — for naps, slow mornings, and quiet walks.
Teach our busy family how to truly rest.
Take the busy thoughts, the leftover worries, and the big feelings of today.
We hand them all to You.
Something peaceful I loved today was ______.
When the world feels loud, be our quiet place.
togetherLine: In peace we lie down and sleep! Amen.

title: A Helping-Hands Prayer
lines: Dear God, Jesus came to serve. Make our family like Him.
Even small hands can do big things with You.
Use our little gifts to make someone's day better.
Show us the people around us who need a hand.
Neighbors, classmates, grandparents, strangers — anyone You choose.
Thank You for ______, who served our family recently.
Let everything we do, big or small, be done with love.
togetherLine: Here we are, God — use us! Amen.

title: Counting Blessings
lines: Father, we stop right now to say thank You — for everything.
Every good gift comes from You, Father.
Thank You for loving us before we even knew how to say thank You.
You give us everything we have: every breath, every meal, every hug.
Help us notice Your gifts all day long, even the tiny ones.
One tiny thing I almost forgot to say thank You for is ______.
Make our family quick to notice gifts and quick to share them.
togetherLine: You are good, and we are grateful! Amen.

title: Bless This House
lines: Father, You knew exactly which people belonged under this roof. Thank You.
Make our family a team that helps each other.
When one of us is sad, help the rest of us be the comfort.
When we argue, help us make up quickly.
Teach us to say "I'm sorry" and "I forgive you" like we really mean it.
God, bless ______ in a special way this week.
Let everyone who visits our home feel Your love inside it.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for our family! Amen.

title: Sorry and Forgiven
lines: Father, we come to You with the things we got wrong today.
Thank You for Jesus, who makes forgiveness possible.
Help us forgive each other the way You forgive us.
You throw our sins as far as the east is from the west.
Help us believe we are really, truly forgiven.
Take this heavy thing off my heart, God: ______.
When someone says sorry to us, help us forgive them fast.
togetherLine: Forgiven and forgiving — that is our family! Amen.

title: Strong and Courageous
lines: Father, some things coming up feel scary. We bring them to You.
Fear is loud, but Your love is stronger.
Help us trust You more than we trust our worries.
You were with David facing the giant and Daniel in the lions' den.
You are the very same God with us today.
God, please be extra close to ______, who needs courage too.
Help us do it scared when we have to — because You are there.
togetherLine: When we are afraid, we will trust in You! Amen.

title: Hands and Hearts That Help
lines: Father, make our family famous for kindness.
Kindness is love everyone can see.
Let people see Your love in the small things we do.
Help our words be sweet like honey, not sharp like sticks.
Help us build people up, never tear them down.
God, show me someone who needs kindness, especially ______.
Let one act of our kindness start a whole chain of it.
togetherLine: Make us kind like Jesus! Amen.

title: Bigger Than Our Walls
lines: Father, You love every person in the whole world. Help us love them too.
We pray for people with no home and no family nearby.
Show them they are not forgotten — not by You, not by us.
We pray for people who are sick, and the doctors and nurses caring for them.
Bring healing, comfort, and hope.
Wrap Your arms around ______ tonight, God.
Remind us that helping one person matters, even when we cannot help everyone.
togetherLine: Your love is for everyone! Amen.

title: In Your Hands
lines: Father, You feed the birds and dress the flowers — and You care for us even more.
Even when life feels stormy, You are our safe place.
Help us remember whose hands are holding us.
Help us trust You with the big things and the little things.
Nothing is too hard for You, and nothing is too small for You.
God, our family trusts You with ______.
Help us remember all the times You came through before.
togetherLine: Our family is in Your hands! Amen.

title: Growing Minds
lines: Father, You made us curious on purpose. Thank You for the joy of learning.
Thank You that we never stop learning, kids and grown-ups alike.
Most of all, help us learn more about You.
When learning feels hard, help us keep going and not give up.
Remind us that every mistake is a step toward learning.
Help me be a good friend to ______ at school.
When tests and big days come, give us calm hearts and clear minds.
togetherLine: Thank You for our growing minds! Amen.

title: Thank You for Friends
lines: Father, thank You for the people who play with us, laugh with us, and stick with us.
Help us notice kids who do not have a friend yet.
Give us courage to be their first one.
Help us be the kind of friend who is loyal and true.
Quick to share, quick to cheer, quick to forgive.
God, help me make a new friend, maybe ______.
Heal any friendships that are hurting right now.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for friends! Amen.

title: Maker of Everything
lines: Maker of mountains and ladybugs, thank You for this incredible world.
Thank You for making each of us wonderfully, on purpose, one of a kind.
Help us believe we are Your masterpiece.
Thank You for seasons: summer splashing, autumn leaves, winter snow, spring flowers.
Every season shows off something new You made.
God, thank You for making me with ______.
Help us remember that everything beautiful points back to You.
togetherLine: The whole earth is full of Your glory! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Praise
lines: Father, this is the day You made, and we are glad in it!
Angels praise You, oceans roar for You, and little kids sing to You.
We join the big song right now!
Thank You for laughter, music, dancing, and happy surprises.
You invented every good thing we love.
God, I want to praise You for ______.
Teach us to praise You in the sunshine and in the rain.
togetherLine: The joy of the Lord is our strength! Amen.

title: Help Us Wait Well
lines: Father, waiting is hard! We need Your help with it.
Thank You for being patient with us when we make the same mistake again.
Help us be that patient with each other.
When little things bug us, help us take a deep breath.
Help us answer gently instead of loudly.
Thank You for being patient with me when I ______.
Grow patience in our family like a strong, slow tree.
togetherLine: Your timing is always right! Amen.

title: Peace for Tonight
lines: Father, thank You for rest — for cozy beds and deep breaths.
Thank You for Sabbath moments — for naps, slow mornings, and quiet walks.
Teach our busy family how to truly rest.
In peace we will lie down and sleep, for You keep us safe.
Thank You for staying awake so we do not have to.
Help my heart be quiet about ______ tonight.
Help our home stay a calm and gentle place this week.
togetherLine: You keep us safe, tonight and always! Amen.

title: Use Us, God
lines: Father, You gave each of us hands that can help. Put them to work!
Even small hands can do big things with You.
Use our little gifts to make someone's day better.
Make us cheerful givers, not grumpy ones.
Help us share our things, our time, and our smiles.
Use my gift of ______ to bless someone, God.
Help us serve the people in this family first and best.
togetherLine: Serve one another in love! Amen.

title: Thank You, Father
lines: Dear God, our hearts are full tonight, and we want to tell You why.
Every good gift comes from You, Father.
Thank You for loving us before we even knew how to say thank You.
Some days we forget how much You give us.
Open our eyes to see Your goodness everywhere we look.
God, today I want to thank You for ______.
Teach us to say thank You first, before we ask for more.
togetherLine: Every good gift comes from You! Amen.

title: Our Family Team
lines: Dear God, bless every person in this family, from the oldest to the youngest.
Make our family a team that helps each other.
When one of us is sad, help the rest of us be the comfort.
Watch over the family we love who are far away, too.
Keep us close to each other and close to You.
God, today I want to thank You for my family member ______.
Show each of us one way to help this family tomorrow.
togetherLine: Love lives here, because You live here! Amen.

title: Clean Hearts
lines: Dear God, You already know our mistakes — and You love us anyway.
Thank You for Jesus, who makes forgiveness possible.
Help us forgive each other the way You forgive us.
Sometimes it is hard to forgive other people.
Make our hearts soft and quick to let go of hurts.
God, I am sorry for ______. Please forgive me.
Help us wake up tomorrow with clean hearts and no grudges.
togetherLine: Your mercy is new every morning! Amen.

title: Not Alone Today
lines: Dear God, You are bigger than every single thing we are afraid of.
Fear is loud, but Your love is stronger.
Help us trust You more than we trust our worries.
Make us brave enough to do what is right, even if our voices shake.
Help us stand up for people who need a friend.
God, please give me courage for ______.
Make each of us brave in the small moments, not just the big ones.
togetherLine: God is bigger! Amen.

title: Kindness Like Jesus
lines: Dear God, thank You for every kind thing someone did for us today.
Kindness is love everyone can see.
Let people see Your love in the small things we do.
Jesus was kind to people everyone else ignored.
Make us brave enough to be kind like that.
God, help me be kind to ______ tomorrow.
Make us gentle with the people in our own house most of all.
togetherLine: Love is something we do! Amen.

title: Hearts for the Hurting
lines: Dear God, some people had a hard day today. We lift them up to You.
We pray for people with no home and no family nearby.
Show them they are not forgotten — not by You, not by us.
We pray for families going through hard times.
Be extra close to them and provide what they need.
God, today we especially pray for ______.
Make our family generous with what we have, because You shared first.
togetherLine: Use our family to share Your love! Amen.

title: You've Got Us, God
lines: Dear God, we do not know what tomorrow holds, but we know You hold tomorrow.
Even when life feels stormy, You are our safe place.
Help us remember whose hands are holding us.
You see what we cannot see and know what we do not know.
Help us lean on You instead of only ourselves.
God, I am giving You my worry about ______.
Grow our trust a little bigger every single day.
togetherLine: You take care of us — always have, always will! Amen.

title: Help Us Learn
lines: Dear God, school and work can be wonderful and hard — sometimes on the same day.
Thank You that we never stop learning, kids and grown-ups alike.
Most of all, help us learn more about You.
Help us be kind at school and at work — to the new kid, the quiet kid, everyone.
Make us brave enough to do what is right there.
God, help me with ______ at school or work this week.
Help us cheer for our classmates instead of comparing.
togetherLine: All wisdom comes from You! Amen.

title: Good Friends, Good Hearts
lines: Dear God, You gave us friends so we never have to do life alone.
Help us notice kids who do not have a friend yet.
Give us courage to be their first one.
If any of our friends are sad or struggling, comfort them.
And show us how to help.
God, thank You for my friend ______.
Make us the friend everyone can count on.
togetherLine: Help us love our friends like You love us! Amen.

title: What a World You Made!
lines: Dear God, the sky has been telling us about You all day.
Thank You for making each of us wonderfully, on purpose, one of a kind.
Help us believe we are Your masterpiece.
The stars remind us how big You are.
And You know every one of them by name — and every one of us, too.
God, my favorite thing You made is ______.
Give us eyes of wonder that never get bored of Your world.
togetherLine: What a wonderful world You made! Amen.

title: Singing to God
lines: Dear God, our hearts feel like singing — so this prayer is our song.
Angels praise You, oceans roar for You, and little kids sing to You.
We join the big song right now!
Even on hard days, You give us reasons for joy.
Our joy is built on You, and You never change.
God, You are so ______! We praise You!
Help us choose joy tomorrow, whatever the day brings.
togetherLine: We praise You, God! Amen.

title: Patient Hearts
lines: Dear God, You are never in a hurry, and You are never late.
Thank You for being patient with us when we make the same mistake again.
Help us be that patient with each other.
Some good things take a long time to grow — like seeds, and like us.
Help us trust Your timing.
God, help me be patient with ______.
Help the biggest and smallest of us count to five before we explode.
togetherLine: Grow patience in us, God! Amen.

title: Rest in You
lines: Dear God, You give peace the world cannot give. We would like some, please.
Thank You for Sabbath moments — for naps, slow mornings, and quiet walks.
Teach our busy family how to truly rest.
Where there are arguments still hanging in the air, bring peace tonight.
Make us peacemakers under this roof.
God, I am handing You this busy thought: ______.
Wake us up tomorrow rested and ready, with brand-new mercies.
togetherLine: Your peace guards our hearts! Amen.

title: Ready to Serve
lines: Dear God, thank You for everyone who served us today, seen and unseen.
Even small hands can do big things with You.
Use our little gifts to make someone's day better.
When we serve someone, You say it is like serving You.
What an honor! Help us remember that tomorrow.
God, I could help ______ this week.
Make serving feel like a joy in our house, not a chore.
togetherLine: Our hands are Yours! Amen.

title: A Thank-You Prayer
lines: Thank You, God, for being so good to our family.
Every good gift comes from You, Father.
Thank You for loving us before we even knew how to say thank You.
Thank You for our home, our food, and the people sitting beside us.
Thank You for the little things too — warm blankets, funny jokes, and good books.
Thank You, God, for making ______, which makes me smile.
Help us have thankful hearts tomorrow, even if the day is hard.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for everything! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Our Family
lines: Thank You, God, for giving us each other.
Make our family a team that helps each other.
When one of us is sad, help the rest of us be the comfort.
Help us to be patient with each other, even on grumpy days.
Make our home a place full of kind words and big laughs.
God, please help our family with ______.
Help our home be a safe, warm place where everyone feels loved.
togetherLine: As for our family, we will serve the Lord! Amen.

title: A Fresh-Start Prayer
lines: God of fresh starts, here we are again, and You are glad to see us.
Thank You for Jesus, who makes forgiveness possible.
Help us forgive each other the way You forgive us.
We are sorry for the unkind words and the selfish moments.
Thank You for never turning us away when we say sorry.
God, help me forgive ______ the way You forgive me.
Give us the courage to apologize first, even when it is hard.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for fresh starts! Amen.

title: A Brave-Heart Prayer
lines: God, You hold our hands when the path feels dark. Thank You.
Fear is loud, but Your love is stronger.
Help us trust You more than we trust our worries.
When we feel small, remind us how big You are.
When we feel alone, remind us You never leave.
God, I feel nervous about ______. Hold my hand through it.
When fear knocks tomorrow, help us remember who is with us.
togetherLine: Be strong and courageous — God is with us! Amen.

title: A Kind-Heart Prayer
lines: God of kindness, fill us up so kindness spills out of us.
Kindness is love everyone can see.
Let people see Your love in the small things we do.
Give us eyes that notice when someone is sad or left out.
Give us feet that walk over and hearts that care.
God, thank You for the kindness ______ showed me.
Help us be kind first, without waiting for kindness to come to us.
togetherLine: Be kind to one another — starting with us! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Others
lines: God, You hear every cry in every country. Hear our prayer for others now.
We pray for people with no home and no family nearby.
Show them they are not forgotten — not by You, not by us.
We pray for kids who are hungry, lonely, or scared tonight.
Send them helpers, and make us helpers too.
God, please help the people who are ______.
Open our eyes tomorrow to one person we can actually help.
togetherLine: Make us helpers, God! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Trust
lines: God, You have taken care of us every day so far. We trust You with the next one.
Even when life feels stormy, You are our safe place.
Help us remember whose hands are holding us.
When we worry, remind us to pray instead.
Trade our heavy worries for Your light peace.
God, help me trust You with ______.
When worries sneak back, help us hand them right back to You.
togetherLine: We trust You, God! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Learning
lines: God of all wisdom, thank You for teachers and books and questions.
Thank You that we never stop learning, kids and grown-ups alike.
Most of all, help us learn more about You.
Bless our teachers and helpers — give them patience and joy.
Help us listen well and try our best.
Thank You for my teacher or helper, ______.
Give us brave hands that raise up even when we are not sure.
togetherLine: Help us grow wiser and kinder every day! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Friends
lines: God, even Jesus had close friends. Thank You for ours.
Help us notice kids who do not have a friend yet.
Give us courage to be their first one.
Bless our friends tonight, at their own houses, with their own families.
Keep them safe and let them know You love them.
God, please bless ______ tonight in a special way.
Help us choose friends who make us kinder and braver.
togetherLine: A friend loves at all times! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Wonder
lines: Father, thank You for sunshine and rain, tall trees and tiny seeds.
Thank You for making each of us wonderfully, on purpose, one of a kind.
Help us believe we are Your masterpiece.
Thank You for animals — the fast ones, the fluffy ones, the funny ones.
You must have smiled when You made them.
Thank You for making ______ — it shows how creative You are!
Help us take good care of the world You gave us.
togetherLine: You made it all, and it is very good! Amen.

title: A Happy-Heart Prayer
lines: God of joy, thank You for making hearts that can be happy.
Angels praise You, oceans roar for You, and little kids sing to You.
We join the big song right now!
You are good all the time — morning, noon, and night.
Nothing and nobody is greater than You.
Something that made me joyful today was ______. Thank You!
Fill our home with joy that spills onto everyone who visits.
togetherLine: This is the day the Lord has made — we will rejoice! Amen.

title: A Slow-Down Prayer
lines: God, today we practice slowing down with You.
Thank You for being patient with us when we make the same mistake again.
Help us be that patient with each other.
Help us be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to get angry.
Put a little pause between our feelings and our words.
God, waiting for ______ is hard. Help me wait well.
Tomorrow, when we have to wait, remind us to talk to You while we do.
togetherLine: Quick to listen, slow to anger! Amen.

title: A Quiet-Heart Prayer
lines: God of peace, quiet our hearts the way You quiet the sea.
Thank You for Sabbath moments — for naps, slow mornings, and quiet walks.
Teach our busy family how to truly rest.
Take the busy thoughts, the leftover worries, and the big feelings of today.
We hand them all to You.
God, bring Your peace to ______.
Guard our hearts and minds with Your peace while we sleep.
togetherLine: In peace we lie down and sleep! Amen.

title: A Helping-Hands Prayer
lines: God, You gave every person in this family a gift. Help us give it away.
Even small hands can do big things with You.
Use our little gifts to make someone's day better.
Show us the people around us who need a hand.
Neighbors, classmates, grandparents, strangers — anyone You choose.
God, one thing I can share is ______.
Open our eyes to one person we can serve tomorrow — then nudge us to do it.
togetherLine: Here we are, God — use us! Amen.

title: Counting Blessings
lines: Dear God, thank You for this day You made just for us.
Thank You for our home, our food, and the people sitting beside us.
Thank You for the little things too — warm blankets, funny jokes, and good books.
Some days we forget how much You give us.
Open our eyes to see Your goodness everywhere we look.
God, thank You for putting ______ in my life.
Help us have thankful hearts tomorrow, even if the day is hard.
togetherLine: You are good, and we are grateful! Amen.

title: Bless This House
lines: Dear God, thank You for our family — the one You put together on purpose.
Help us to be patient with each other, even on grumpy days.
Make our home a place full of kind words and big laughs.
Watch over the family we love who are far away, too.
Keep us close to each other and close to You.
One thing I love about our family is ______.
Help our home be a safe, warm place where everyone feels loved.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for our family! Amen.

title: Sorry and Forgiven
lines: Dear God, thank You for forgiving us every single time we ask.
We are sorry for the unkind words and the selfish moments.
Thank You for never turning us away when we say sorry.
Sometimes it is hard to forgive other people.
Make our hearts soft and quick to let go of hurts.
God, help me say sorry to ______ tomorrow.
Give us the courage to apologize first, even when it is hard.
togetherLine: Forgiven and forgiving — that is our family! Amen.

title: Strong and Courageous
lines: Dear God, You tell us, "Do not be afraid, for I am with you." Thank You.
When we feel small, remind us how big You are.
When we feel alone, remind us You never leave.
Make us brave enough to do what is right, even if our voices shake.
Help us stand up for people who need a friend.
Help me be brave enough to ______ this week.
When fear knocks tomorrow, help us remember who is with us.
togetherLine: When we are afraid, we will trust in You! Amen.

title: Hands and Hearts That Help
lines: Dear God, You are kind to us every day. Help us pass it on.
Give us eyes that notice when someone is sad or left out.
Give us feet that walk over and hearts that care.
Jesus was kind to people everyone else ignored.
Make us brave enough to be kind like that.
One kind thing I can do tomorrow is ______.
Help us be kind first, without waiting for kindness to come to us.
togetherLine: Make us kind like Jesus! Amen.

title: Bigger Than Our Walls
lines: Dear God, tonight we pray not for ourselves, but for others.
We pray for kids who are hungry, lonely, or scared tonight.
Send them helpers, and make us helpers too.
We pray for families going through hard times.
Be extra close to them and provide what they need.
God, show our family how to help ______.
Open our eyes tomorrow to one person we can actually help.
togetherLine: Your love is for everyone! Amen.

title: In Your Hands
lines: Dear God, we put our whole family in Your hands tonight.
When we worry, remind us to pray instead.
Trade our heavy worries for Your light peace.
You see what we cannot see and know what we do not know.
Help us lean on You instead of only ourselves.
Today You took care of me by ______. Thank You.
When worries sneak back, help us hand them right back to You.
togetherLine: Our family is in Your hands! Amen.

title: Growing Minds
lines: Dear God, thank You for our growing brains and everything they can learn.
Bless our teachers and helpers — give them patience and joy.
Help us listen well and try our best.
Help us be kind at school and at work — to the new kid, the quiet kid, everyone.
Make us brave enough to do what is right there.
God, something cool I learned recently is ______.
Give us brave hands that raise up even when we are not sure.
togetherLine: Thank You for our growing minds! Amen.

title: Thank You for Friends
lines: Dear God, thank You for friends — what a wonderful idea You had!
Bless our friends tonight, at their own houses, with their own families.
Keep them safe and let them know You love them.
If any of our friends are sad or struggling, comfort them.
And show us how to help.
Help me be a better friend by ______.
Help us choose friends who make us kinder and braver.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for friends! Amen.

title: Maker of Everything
lines: Dear God, You made everything — and everything You made is amazing.
Thank You for animals — the fast ones, the fluffy ones, the funny ones.
You must have smiled when You made them.
The stars remind us how big You are.
And You know every one of them by name — and every one of us, too.
Today in Your world I noticed ______.
Help us take good care of the world You gave us.
togetherLine: The whole earth is full of Your glory! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Praise
lines: Dear God, today we just want to tell You how great You are!
You are good all the time — morning, noon, and night.
Nothing and nobody is greater than You.
Even on hard days, You give us reasons for joy.
Our joy is built on You, and You never change.
If my heart had a song today, it would be about ______.
Fill our home with joy that spills onto everyone who visits.
togetherLine: The joy of the Lord is our strength! Amen.

title: Help Us Wait Well
lines: Dear God, You are so patient with us. Help us be patient too.
Help us be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to get angry.
Put a little pause between our feelings and our words.
Some good things take a long time to grow — like seeds, and like us.
Help us trust Your timing.
When I feel impatient, help me ______ instead.
Tomorrow, when we have to wait, remind us to talk to You while we do.
togetherLine: Your timing is always right! Amen.

title: Peace for Tonight
lines: Dear God, as this day winds down, we bring You our whole selves.
Take the busy thoughts, the leftover worries, and the big feelings of today.
We hand them all to You.
Where there are arguments still hanging in the air, bring peace tonight.
Make us peacemakers under this roof.
Something peaceful I loved today was ______.
Guard our hearts and minds with Your peace while we sleep.
togetherLine: You keep us safe, tonight and always! Amen.

title: Use Us, God
lines: Dear God, Jesus came to serve. Make our family like Him.
Show us the people around us who need a hand.
Neighbors, classmates, grandparents, strangers — anyone You choose.
When we serve someone, You say it is like serving You.
What an honor! Help us remember that tomorrow.
Thank You for ______, who served our family recently.
Open our eyes to one person we can serve tomorrow — then nudge us to do it.
togetherLine: Serve one another in love! Amen.

title: Thank You, Father
lines: Father, we stop right now to say thank You — for everything.
Thank You for our home, our food, and the people sitting beside us.
Thank You for the little things too — warm blankets, funny jokes, and good books.
Every good gift comes from You, Father.
Thank You for loving us before we even knew how to say thank You.
One tiny thing I almost forgot to say thank You for is ______.
Help us thank the people around us, too — out loud, like we mean it.
togetherLine: Every good gift comes from You! Amen.

title: Our Family Team
lines: Father, You knew exactly which people belonged under this roof. Thank You.
Help us to be patient with each other, even on grumpy days.
Make our home a place full of kind words and big laughs.
Make our family a team that helps each other.
When one of us is sad, help the rest of us be the comfort.
God, bless ______ in a special way this week.
Keep us loving each other no matter what happens.
togetherLine: Love lives here, because You live here! Amen.

title: Clean Hearts
lines: Father, we come to You with the things we got wrong today.
We are sorry for the unkind words and the selfish moments.
Thank You for never turning us away when we say sorry.
Thank You for Jesus, who makes forgiveness possible.
Help us forgive each other the way You forgive us.
Take this heavy thing off my heart, God: ______.
Keep our family quick to repair what gets broken between us.
togetherLine: Your mercy is new every morning! Amen.

title: Not Alone Today
lines: Father, some things coming up feel scary. We bring them to You.
When we feel small, remind us how big You are.
When we feel alone, remind us You never leave.
Fear is loud, but Your love is stronger.
Help us trust You more than we trust our worries.
God, please be extra close to ______, who needs courage too.
Turn our worries into prayers the moment they show up.
togetherLine: God is bigger! Amen.

title: Kindness Like Jesus
lines: Father, make our family famous for kindness.
Give us eyes that notice when someone is sad or left out.
Give us feet that walk over and hearts that care.
Kindness is love everyone can see.
Let people see Your love in the small things we do.
God, show me someone who needs kindness, especially ______.
Help us be kind even to people who are not kind to us.
togetherLine: Love is something we do! Amen.

title: Hearts for the Hurting
lines: Father, You love every person in the whole world. Help us love them too.
We pray for kids who are hungry, lonely, or scared tonight.
Send them helpers, and make us helpers too.
We pray for people with no home and no family nearby.
Show them they are not forgotten — not by You, not by us.
Wrap Your arms around ______ tonight, God.
Use our hands, our snacks, our dollars, and our time however You want.
togetherLine: Use our family to share Your love! Amen.

title: You've Got Us, God
lines: Father, You feed the birds and dress the flowers — and You care for us even more.
When we worry, remind us to pray instead.
Trade our heavy worries for Your light peace.
Even when life feels stormy, You are our safe place.
Help us remember whose hands are holding us.
God, our family trusts You with ______.
Give us peaceful sleep tonight, because You stay awake watching over us.
togetherLine: You take care of us — always have, always will! Amen.

title: Help Us Learn
lines: Father, You made us curious on purpose. Thank You for the joy of learning.
Bless our teachers and helpers — give them patience and joy.
Help us listen well and try our best.
Thank You that we never stop learning, kids and grown-ups alike.
Most of all, help us learn more about You.
Help me be a good friend to ______ at school.
Make us hard workers who do everything like we are doing it for You.
togetherLine: All wisdom comes from You! Amen.

title: Good Friends, Good Hearts
lines: Father, thank You for the people who play with us, laugh with us, and stick with us.
Bless our friends tonight, at their own houses, with their own families.
Keep them safe and let them know You love them.
Help us notice kids who do not have a friend yet.
Give us courage to be their first one.
God, help me make a new friend, maybe ______.
Thank You for being our best friend of all, Jesus.
togetherLine: Help us love our friends like You love us! Amen.

title: What a World You Made!
lines: Maker of mountains and ladybugs, thank You for this incredible world.
Thank You for animals — the fast ones, the fluffy ones, the funny ones.
You must have smiled when You made them.
Thank You for making each of us wonderfully, on purpose, one of a kind.
Help us believe we are Your masterpiece.
God, thank You for making me with ______.
Thank You for making people the most special creation of all.
togetherLine: What a wonderful world You made! Amen.

title: Singing to God
lines: Father, this is the day You made, and we are glad in it!
You are good all the time — morning, noon, and night.
Nothing and nobody is greater than You.
Angels praise You, oceans roar for You, and little kids sing to You.
We join the big song right now!
God, I want to praise You for ______.
Let our family's laughter be a kind of thank-You to You.
togetherLine: We praise You, God! Amen.

title: Patient Hearts
lines: Father, waiting is hard! We need Your help with it.
Help us be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to get angry.
Put a little pause between our feelings and our words.
Thank You for being patient with us when we make the same mistake again.
Help us be that patient with each other.
Thank You for being patient with me when I ______.
Help us give each other time to grow, the way You give us time.
togetherLine: Grow patience in us, God! Amen.

title: Rest in You
lines: Father, thank You for rest — for cozy beds and deep breaths.
Take the busy thoughts, the leftover worries, and the big feelings of today.
We hand them all to You.
Thank You for Sabbath moments — for naps, slow mornings, and quiet walks.
Teach our busy family how to truly rest.
Help my heart be quiet about ______ tonight.
When the world feels loud, be our quiet place.
togetherLine: Your peace guards our hearts! Amen.

title: Ready to Serve
lines: Father, You gave each of us hands that can help. Put them to work!
Show us the people around us who need a hand.
Neighbors, classmates, grandparents, strangers — anyone You choose.
Even small hands can do big things with You.
Use our little gifts to make someone's day better.
Use my gift of ______ to bless someone, God.
Let everything we do, big or small, be done with love.
togetherLine: Our hands are Yours! Amen.

title: A Thank-You Prayer
lines: Dear God, our hearts are full tonight, and we want to tell You why.
Thank You for our home, our food, and the people sitting beside us.
Thank You for the little things too — warm blankets, funny jokes, and good books.
You give us everything we have: every breath, every meal, every hug.
Help us notice Your gifts all day long, even the tiny ones.
God, today I want to thank You for ______.
Make our family quick to notice gifts and quick to share them.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for everything! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Our Family
lines: Dear God, bless every person in this family, from the oldest to the youngest.
Help us to be patient with each other, even on grumpy days.
Make our home a place full of kind words and big laughs.
When we argue, help us make up quickly.
Teach us to say "I'm sorry" and "I forgive you" like we really mean it.
God, today I want to thank You for my family member ______.
Let everyone who visits our home feel Your love inside it.
togetherLine: As for our family, we will serve the Lord! Amen.

title: A Fresh-Start Prayer
lines: Dear God, You already know our mistakes — and You love us anyway.
We are sorry for the unkind words and the selfish moments.
Thank You for never turning us away when we say sorry.
You throw our sins as far as the east is from the west.
Help us believe we are really, truly forgiven.
God, I am sorry for ______. Please forgive me.
When someone says sorry to us, help us forgive them fast.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for fresh starts! Amen.

title: A Brave-Heart Prayer
lines: Dear God, You are bigger than every single thing we are afraid of.
When we feel small, remind us how big You are.
When we feel alone, remind us You never leave.
You were with David facing the giant and Daniel in the lions' den.
You are the very same God with us today.
God, please give me courage for ______.
Help us do it scared when we have to — because You are there.
togetherLine: Be strong and courageous — God is with us! Amen.

title: A Kind-Heart Prayer
lines: Dear God, thank You for every kind thing someone did for us today.
Give us eyes that notice when someone is sad or left out.
Give us feet that walk over and hearts that care.
Help our words be sweet like honey, not sharp like sticks.
Help us build people up, never tear them down.
God, help me be kind to ______ tomorrow.
Let one act of our kindness start a whole chain of it.
togetherLine: Be kind to one another — starting with us! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Others
lines: Dear God, some people had a hard day today. We lift them up to You.
We pray for kids who are hungry, lonely, or scared tonight.
Send them helpers, and make us helpers too.
We pray for people who are sick, and the doctors and nurses caring for them.
Bring healing, comfort, and hope.
God, today we especially pray for ______.
Remind us that helping one person matters, even when we cannot help everyone.
togetherLine: Make us helpers, God! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Trust
lines: Dear God, we do not know what tomorrow holds, but we know You hold tomorrow.
When we worry, remind us to pray instead.
Trade our heavy worries for Your light peace.
Help us trust You with the big things and the little things.
Nothing is too hard for You, and nothing is too small for You.
God, I am giving You my worry about ______.
Help us remember all the times You came through before.
togetherLine: We trust You, God! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Learning
lines: Dear God, school and work can be wonderful and hard — sometimes on the same day.
Bless our teachers and helpers — give them patience and joy.
Help us listen well and try our best.
When learning feels hard, help us keep going and not give up.
Remind us that every mistake is a step toward learning.
God, help me with ______ at school or work this week.
When tests and big days come, give us calm hearts and clear minds.
togetherLine: Help us grow wiser and kinder every day! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Friends
lines: Dear God, You gave us friends so we never have to do life alone.
Bless our friends tonight, at their own houses, with their own families.
Keep them safe and let them know You love them.
Help us be the kind of friend who is loyal and true.
Quick to share, quick to cheer, quick to forgive.
God, thank You for my friend ______.
Heal any friendships that are hurting right now.
togetherLine: A friend loves at all times! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Wonder
lines: Dear God, the sky has been telling us about You all day.
Thank You for animals — the fast ones, the fluffy ones, the funny ones.
You must have smiled when You made them.
Thank You for seasons: summer splashing, autumn leaves, winter snow, spring flowers.
Every season shows off something new You made.
God, my favorite thing You made is ______.
Help us remember that everything beautiful points back to You.
togetherLine: You made it all, and it is very good! Amen.

title: A Happy-Heart Prayer
lines: Dear God, our hearts feel like singing — so this prayer is our song.
You are good all the time — morning, noon, and night.
Nothing and nobody is greater than You.
Thank You for laughter, music, dancing, and happy surprises.
You invented every good thing we love.
God, You are so ______! We praise You!
Teach us to praise You in the sunshine and in the rain.
togetherLine: This is the day the Lord has made — we will rejoice! Amen.

title: A Slow-Down Prayer
lines: Dear God, You are never in a hurry, and You are never late.
Help us be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to get angry.
Put a little pause between our feelings and our words.
When little things bug us, help us take a deep breath.
Help us answer gently instead of loudly.
God, help me be patient with ______.
Grow patience in our family like a strong, slow tree.
togetherLine: Quick to listen, slow to anger! Amen.

title: A Quiet-Heart Prayer
lines: Dear God, You give peace the world cannot give. We would like some, please.
Take the busy thoughts, the leftover worries, and the big feelings of today.
We hand them all to You.
In peace we will lie down and sleep, for You keep us safe.
Thank You for staying awake so we do not have to.
God, I am handing You this busy thought: ______.
Help our home stay a calm and gentle place this week.
togetherLine: In peace we lie down and sleep! Amen.

title: A Helping-Hands Prayer
lines: Dear God, thank You for everyone who served us today, seen and unseen.
Show us the people around us who need a hand.
Neighbors, classmates, grandparents, strangers — anyone You choose.
Make us cheerful givers, not grumpy ones.
Help us share our things, our time, and our smiles.
God, I could help ______ this week.
Help us serve the people in this family first and best.
togetherLine: Here we are, God — use us! Amen.

title: Counting Blessings
lines: Thank You, God, for being so good to our family.
Thank You for our home, our food, and the people sitting beside us.
Thank You for the little things too — warm blankets, funny jokes, and good books.
Some days we forget how much You give us.
Open our eyes to see Your goodness everywhere we look.
Thank You, God, for making ______, which makes me smile.
Teach us to say thank You first, before we ask for more.
togetherLine: You are good, and we are grateful! Amen.

title: Bless This House
lines: Thank You, God, for giving us each other.
Help us to be patient with each other, even on grumpy days.
Make our home a place full of kind words and big laughs.
Watch over the family we love who are far away, too.
Keep us close to each other and close to You.
God, please help our family with ______.
Show each of us one way to help this family tomorrow.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for our family! Amen.

title: Sorry and Forgiven
lines: God of fresh starts, here we are again, and You are glad to see us.
We are sorry for the unkind words and the selfish moments.
Thank You for never turning us away when we say sorry.
Sometimes it is hard to forgive other people.
Make our hearts soft and quick to let go of hurts.
God, help me forgive ______ the way You forgive me.
Help us wake up tomorrow with clean hearts and no grudges.
togetherLine: Forgiven and forgiving — that is our family! Amen.

title: Strong and Courageous
lines: God, You hold our hands when the path feels dark. Thank You.
When we feel small, remind us how big You are.
When we feel alone, remind us You never leave.
Make us brave enough to do what is right, even if our voices shake.
Help us stand up for people who need a friend.
God, I feel nervous about ______. Hold my hand through it.
Make each of us brave in the small moments, not just the big ones.
togetherLine: When we are afraid, we will trust in You! Amen.

title: Hands and Hearts That Help
lines: God of kindness, fill us up so kindness spills out of us.
Give us eyes that notice when someone is sad or left out.
Give us feet that walk over and hearts that care.
Jesus was kind to people everyone else ignored.
Make us brave enough to be kind like that.
God, thank You for the kindness ______ showed me.
Make us gentle with the people in our own house most of all.
togetherLine: Make us kind like Jesus! Amen.

title: Bigger Than Our Walls
lines: God, You hear every cry in every country. Hear our prayer for others now.
We pray for kids who are hungry, lonely, or scared tonight.
Send them helpers, and make us helpers too.
We pray for families going through hard times.
Be extra close to them and provide what they need.
God, please help the people who are ______.
Make our family generous with what we have, because You shared first.
togetherLine: Your love is for everyone! Amen.

title: In Your Hands
lines: God, You have taken care of us every day so far. We trust You with the next one.
When we worry, remind us to pray instead.
Trade our heavy worries for Your light peace.
You see what we cannot see and know what we do not know.
Help us lean on You instead of only ourselves.
God, help me trust You with ______.
Grow our trust a little bigger every single day.
togetherLine: Our family is in Your hands! Amen.

title: Growing Minds
lines: God of all wisdom, thank You for teachers and books and questions.
Bless our teachers and helpers — give them patience and joy.
Help us listen well and try our best.
Help us be kind at school and at work — to the new kid, the quiet kid, everyone.
Make us brave enough to do what is right there.
Thank You for my teacher or helper, ______.
Help us cheer for our classmates instead of comparing.
togetherLine: Thank You for our growing minds! Amen.

title: Thank You for Friends
lines: God, even Jesus had close friends. Thank You for ours.
Bless our friends tonight, at their own houses, with their own families.
Keep them safe and let them know You love them.
If any of our friends are sad or struggling, comfort them.
And show us how to help.
God, please bless ______ tonight in a special way.
Make us the friend everyone can count on.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for friends! Amen.

title: Maker of Everything
lines: Father, thank You for sunshine and rain, tall trees and tiny seeds.
Thank You for animals — the fast ones, the fluffy ones, the funny ones.
You must have smiled when You made them.
The stars remind us how big You are.
And You know every one of them by name — and every one of us, too.
Thank You for making ______ — it shows how creative You are!
Give us eyes of wonder that never get bored of Your world.
togetherLine: The whole earth is full of Your glory! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Praise
lines: God of joy, thank You for making hearts that can be happy.
You are good all the time — morning, noon, and night.
Nothing and nobody is greater than You.
Even on hard days, You give us reasons for joy.
Our joy is built on You, and You never change.
Something that made me joyful today was ______. Thank You!
Help us choose joy tomorrow, whatever the day brings.
togetherLine: The joy of the Lord is our strength! Amen.

title: Help Us Wait Well
lines: God, today we practice slowing down with You.
Help us be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to get angry.
Put a little pause between our feelings and our words.
Some good things take a long time to grow — like seeds, and like us.
Help us trust Your timing.
God, waiting for ______ is hard. Help me wait well.
Help the biggest and smallest of us count to five before we explode.
togetherLine: Your timing is always right! Amen.

title: Peace for Tonight
lines: God of peace, quiet our hearts the way You quiet the sea.
Take the busy thoughts, the leftover worries, and the big feelings of today.
We hand them all to You.
Where there are arguments still hanging in the air, bring peace tonight.
Make us peacemakers under this roof.
God, bring Your peace to ______.
Wake us up tomorrow rested and ready, with brand-new mercies.
togetherLine: You keep us safe, tonight and always! Amen.

title: Use Us, God
lines: God, You gave every person in this family a gift. Help us give it away.
Show us the people around us who need a hand.
Neighbors, classmates, grandparents, strangers — anyone You choose.
When we serve someone, You say it is like serving You.
What an honor! Help us remember that tomorrow.
God, one thing I can share is ______.
Make serving feel like a joy in our house, not a chore.
togetherLine: Serve one another in love! Amen.

title: Thank You, Father
lines: Dear God, thank You for this day You made just for us.
You give us everything we have: every breath, every meal, every hug.
Help us notice Your gifts all day long, even the tiny ones.
Thank You for our home, our food, and the people sitting beside us.
Thank You for the little things too — warm blankets, funny jokes, and good books.
God, thank You for putting ______ in my life.
Teach us to say thank You first, before we ask for more.
togetherLine: Every good gift comes from You! Amen.

title: Our Family Team
lines: Dear God, thank You for our family — the one You put together on purpose.
When we argue, help us make up quickly.
Teach us to say "I'm sorry" and "I forgive you" like we really mean it.
Help us to be patient with each other, even on grumpy days.
Make our home a place full of kind words and big laughs.
One thing I love about our family is ______.
Show each of us one way to help this family tomorrow.
togetherLine: Love lives here, because You live here! Amen.

title: Clean Hearts
lines: Dear God, thank You for forgiving us every single time we ask.
You throw our sins as far as the east is from the west.
Help us believe we are really, truly forgiven.
We are sorry for the unkind words and the selfish moments.
Thank You for never turning us away when we say sorry.
God, help me say sorry to ______ tomorrow.
Help us wake up tomorrow with clean hearts and no grudges.
togetherLine: Your mercy is new every morning! Amen.

title: Not Alone Today
lines: Dear God, You tell us, "Do not be afraid, for I am with you." Thank You.
You were with David facing the giant and Daniel in the lions' den.
You are the very same God with us today.
When we feel small, remind us how big You are.
When we feel alone, remind us You never leave.
Help me be brave enough to ______ this week.
Make each of us brave in the small moments, not just the big ones.
togetherLine: God is bigger! Amen.

title: Kindness Like Jesus
lines: Dear God, You are kind to us every day. Help us pass it on.
Help our words be sweet like honey, not sharp like sticks.
Help us build people up, never tear them down.
Give us eyes that notice when someone is sad or left out.
Give us feet that walk over and hearts that care.
One kind thing I can do tomorrow is ______.
Make us gentle with the people in our own house most of all.
togetherLine: Love is something we do! Amen.

title: Hearts for the Hurting
lines: Dear God, tonight we pray not for ourselves, but for others.
We pray for people who are sick, and the doctors and nurses caring for them.
Bring healing, comfort, and hope.
We pray for kids who are hungry, lonely, or scared tonight.
Send them helpers, and make us helpers too.
God, show our family how to help ______.
Make our family generous with what we have, because You shared first.
togetherLine: Use our family to share Your love! Amen.

title: You've Got Us, God
lines: Dear God, we put our whole family in Your hands tonight.
Help us trust You with the big things and the little things.
Nothing is too hard for You, and nothing is too small for You.
When we worry, remind us to pray instead.
Trade our heavy worries for Your light peace.
Today You took care of me by ______. Thank You.
Grow our trust a little bigger every single day.
togetherLine: You take care of us — always have, always will! Amen.

title: Help Us Learn
lines: Dear God, thank You for our growing brains and everything they can learn.
When learning feels hard, help us keep going and not give up.
Remind us that every mistake is a step toward learning.
Bless our teachers and helpers — give them patience and joy.
Help us listen well and try our best.
God, something cool I learned recently is ______.
Help us cheer for our classmates instead of comparing.
togetherLine: All wisdom comes from You! Amen.

title: Good Friends, Good Hearts
lines: Dear God, thank You for friends — what a wonderful idea You had!
Help us be the kind of friend who is loyal and true.
Quick to share, quick to cheer, quick to forgive.
Bless our friends tonight, at their own houses, with their own families.
Keep them safe and let them know You love them.
Help me be a better friend by ______.
Make us the friend everyone can count on.
togetherLine: Help us love our friends like You love us! Amen.

title: What a World You Made!
lines: Dear God, You made everything — and everything You made is amazing.
Thank You for seasons: summer splashing, autumn leaves, winter snow, spring flowers.
Every season shows off something new You made.
Thank You for animals — the fast ones, the fluffy ones, the funny ones.
You must have smiled when You made them.
Today in Your world I noticed ______.
Give us eyes of wonder that never get bored of Your world.
togetherLine: What a wonderful world You made! Amen.

title: Singing to God
lines: Dear God, today we just want to tell You how great You are!
Thank You for laughter, music, dancing, and happy surprises.
You invented every good thing we love.
You are good all the time — morning, noon, and night.
Nothing and nobody is greater than You.
If my heart had a song today, it would be about ______.
Help us choose joy tomorrow, whatever the day brings.
togetherLine: We praise You, God! Amen.

title: Patient Hearts
lines: Dear God, You are so patient with us. Help us be patient too.
When little things bug us, help us take a deep breath.
Help us answer gently instead of loudly.
Help us be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to get angry.
Put a little pause between our feelings and our words.
When I feel impatient, help me ______ instead.
Help the biggest and smallest of us count to five before we explode.
togetherLine: Grow patience in us, God! Amen.

title: Rest in You
lines: Dear God, as this day winds down, we bring You our whole selves.
In peace we will lie down and sleep, for You keep us safe.
Thank You for staying awake so we do not have to.
Take the busy thoughts, the leftover worries, and the big feelings of today.
We hand them all to You.
Something peaceful I loved today was ______.
Wake us up tomorrow rested and ready, with brand-new mercies.
togetherLine: Your peace guards our hearts! Amen.

title: Ready to Serve
lines: Dear God, Jesus came to serve. Make our family like Him.
Make us cheerful givers, not grumpy ones.
Help us share our things, our time, and our smiles.
Show us the people around us who need a hand.
Neighbors, classmates, grandparents, strangers — anyone You choose.
Thank You for ______, who served our family recently.
Make serving feel like a joy in our house, not a chore.
togetherLine: Our hands are Yours! Amen.

title: A Thank-You Prayer
lines: Father, we stop right now to say thank You — for everything.
You give us everything we have: every breath, every meal, every hug.
Help us notice Your gifts all day long, even the tiny ones.
Some days we forget how much You give us.
Open our eyes to see Your goodness everywhere we look.
One tiny thing I almost forgot to say thank You for is ______.
Help us have thankful hearts tomorrow, even if the day is hard.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for everything! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Our Family
lines: Father, You knew exactly which people belonged under this roof. Thank You.
When we argue, help us make up quickly.
Teach us to say "I'm sorry" and "I forgive you" like we really mean it.
Watch over the family we love who are far away, too.
Keep us close to each other and close to You.
God, bless ______ in a special way this week.
Help our home be a safe, warm place where everyone feels loved.
togetherLine: As for our family, we will serve the Lord! Amen.

title: A Fresh-Start Prayer
lines: Father, we come to You with the things we got wrong today.
You throw our sins as far as the east is from the west.
Help us believe we are really, truly forgiven.
Sometimes it is hard to forgive other people.
Make our hearts soft and quick to let go of hurts.
Take this heavy thing off my heart, God: ______.
Give us the courage to apologize first, even when it is hard.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for fresh starts! Amen.

title: A Brave-Heart Prayer
lines: Father, some things coming up feel scary. We bring them to You.
You were with David facing the giant and Daniel in the lions' den.
You are the very same God with us today.
Make us brave enough to do what is right, even if our voices shake.
Help us stand up for people who need a friend.
God, please be extra close to ______, who needs courage too.
When fear knocks tomorrow, help us remember who is with us.
togetherLine: Be strong and courageous — God is with us! Amen.

title: A Kind-Heart Prayer
lines: Father, make our family famous for kindness.
Help our words be sweet like honey, not sharp like sticks.
Help us build people up, never tear them down.
Jesus was kind to people everyone else ignored.
Make us brave enough to be kind like that.
God, show me someone who needs kindness, especially ______.
Help us be kind first, without waiting for kindness to come to us.
togetherLine: Be kind to one another — starting with us! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Others
lines: Father, You love every person in the whole world. Help us love them too.
We pray for people who are sick, and the doctors and nurses caring for them.
Bring healing, comfort, and hope.
We pray for families going through hard times.
Be extra close to them and provide what they need.
Wrap Your arms around ______ tonight, God.
Open our eyes tomorrow to one person we can actually help.
togetherLine: Make us helpers, God! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Trust
lines: Father, You feed the birds and dress the flowers — and You care for us even more.
Help us trust You with the big things and the little things.
Nothing is too hard for You, and nothing is too small for You.
You see what we cannot see and know what we do not know.
Help us lean on You instead of only ourselves.
God, our family trusts You with ______.
When worries sneak back, help us hand them right back to You.
togetherLine: We trust You, God! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Learning
lines: Father, You made us curious on purpose. Thank You for the joy of learning.
When learning feels hard, help us keep going and not give up.
Remind us that every mistake is a step toward learning.
Help us be kind at school and at work — to the new kid, the quiet kid, everyone.
Make us brave enough to do what is right there.
Help me be a good friend to ______ at school.
Give us brave hands that raise up even when we are not sure.
togetherLine: Help us grow wiser and kinder every day! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Friends
lines: Father, thank You for the people who play with us, laugh with us, and stick with us.
Help us be the kind of friend who is loyal and true.
Quick to share, quick to cheer, quick to forgive.
If any of our friends are sad or struggling, comfort them.
And show us how to help.
God, help me make a new friend, maybe ______.
Help us choose friends who make us kinder and braver.
togetherLine: A friend loves at all times! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Wonder
lines: Maker of mountains and ladybugs, thank You for this incredible world.
Thank You for seasons: summer splashing, autumn leaves, winter snow, spring flowers.
Every season shows off something new You made.
The stars remind us how big You are.
And You know every one of them by name — and every one of us, too.
God, thank You for making me with ______.
Help us take good care of the world You gave us.
togetherLine: You made it all, and it is very good! Amen.

title: A Happy-Heart Prayer
lines: Father, this is the day You made, and we are glad in it!
Thank You for laughter, music, dancing, and happy surprises.
You invented every good thing we love.
Even on hard days, You give us reasons for joy.
Our joy is built on You, and You never change.
God, I want to praise You for ______.
Fill our home with joy that spills onto everyone who visits.
togetherLine: This is the day the Lord has made — we will rejoice! Amen.

title: A Slow-Down Prayer
lines: Father, waiting is hard! We need Your help with it.
When little things bug us, help us take a deep breath.
Help us answer gently instead of loudly.
Some good things take a long time to grow — like seeds, and like us.
Help us trust Your timing.
Thank You for being patient with me when I ______.
Tomorrow, when we have to wait, remind us to talk to You while we do.
togetherLine: Quick to listen, slow to anger! Amen.

title: A Quiet-Heart Prayer
lines: Father, thank You for rest — for cozy beds and deep breaths.
In peace we will lie down and sleep, for You keep us safe.
Thank You for staying awake so we do not have to.
Where there are arguments still hanging in the air, bring peace tonight.
Make us peacemakers under this roof.
Help my heart be quiet about ______ tonight.
Guard our hearts and minds with Your peace while we sleep.
togetherLine: In peace we lie down and sleep! Amen.

title: A Helping-Hands Prayer
lines: Father, You gave each of us hands that can help. Put them to work!
Make us cheerful givers, not grumpy ones.
Help us share our things, our time, and our smiles.
When we serve someone, You say it is like serving You.
What an honor! Help us remember that tomorrow.
Use my gift of ______ to bless someone, God.
Open our eyes to one person we can serve tomorrow — then nudge us to do it.
togetherLine: Here we are, God — use us! Amen.

title: Counting Blessings
lines: Dear God, our hearts are full tonight, and we want to tell You why.
You give us everything we have: every breath, every meal, every hug.
Help us notice Your gifts all day long, even the tiny ones.
Every good gift comes from You, Father.
Thank You for loving us before we even knew how to say thank You.
God, today I want to thank You for ______.
Help us thank the people around us, too — out loud, like we mean it.
togetherLine: You are good, and we are grateful! Amen.

title: Bless This House
lines: Dear God, bless every person in this family, from the oldest to the youngest.
When we argue, help us make up quickly.
Teach us to say "I'm sorry" and "I forgive you" like we really mean it.
Make our family a team that helps each other.
When one of us is sad, help the rest of us be the comfort.
God, today I want to thank You for my family member ______.
Keep us loving each other no matter what happens.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for our family! Amen.

title: Sorry and Forgiven
lines: Dear God, You already know our mistakes — and You love us anyway.
You throw our sins as far as the east is from the west.
Help us believe we are really, truly forgiven.
Thank You for Jesus, who makes forgiveness possible.
Help us forgive each other the way You forgive us.
God, I am sorry for ______. Please forgive me.
Keep our family quick to repair what gets broken between us.
togetherLine: Forgiven and forgiving — that is our family! Amen.

title: Strong and Courageous
lines: Dear God, You are bigger than every single thing we are afraid of.
You were with David facing the giant and Daniel in the lions' den.
You are the very same God with us today.
Fear is loud, but Your love is stronger.
Help us trust You more than we trust our worries.
God, please give me courage for ______.
Turn our worries into prayers the moment they show up.
togetherLine: When we are afraid, we will trust in You! Amen.

title: Hands and Hearts That Help
lines: Dear God, thank You for every kind thing someone did for us today.
Help our words be sweet like honey, not sharp like sticks.
Help us build people up, never tear them down.
Kindness is love everyone can see.
Let people see Your love in the small things we do.
God, help me be kind to ______ tomorrow.
Help us be kind even to people who are not kind to us.
togetherLine: Make us kind like Jesus! Amen.

title: Bigger Than Our Walls
lines: Dear God, some people had a hard day today. We lift them up to You.
We pray for people who are sick, and the doctors and nurses caring for them.
Bring healing, comfort, and hope.
We pray for people with no home and no family nearby.
Show them they are not forgotten — not by You, not by us.
God, today we especially pray for ______.
Use our hands, our snacks, our dollars, and our time however You want.
togetherLine: Your love is for everyone! Amen.

title: In Your Hands
lines: Dear God, we do not know what tomorrow holds, but we know You hold tomorrow.
Help us trust You with the big things and the little things.
Nothing is too hard for You, and nothing is too small for You.
Even when life feels stormy, You are our safe place.
Help us remember whose hands are holding us.
God, I am giving You my worry about ______.
Give us peaceful sleep tonight, because You stay awake watching over us.
togetherLine: Our family is in Your hands! Amen.

title: Growing Minds
lines: Dear God, school and work can be wonderful and hard — sometimes on the same day.
When learning feels hard, help us keep going and not give up.
Remind us that every mistake is a step toward learning.
Thank You that we never stop learning, kids and grown-ups alike.
Most of all, help us learn more about You.
God, help me with ______ at school or work this week.
Make us hard workers who do everything like we are doing it for You.
togetherLine: Thank You for our growing minds! Amen.

title: Thank You for Friends
lines: Dear God, You gave us friends so we never have to do life alone.
Help us be the kind of friend who is loyal and true.
Quick to share, quick to cheer, quick to forgive.
Help us notice kids who do not have a friend yet.
Give us courage to be their first one.
God, thank You for my friend ______.
Thank You for being our best friend of all, Jesus.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for friends! Amen.

title: Maker of Everything
lines: Dear God, the sky has been telling us about You all day.
Thank You for seasons: summer splashing, autumn leaves, winter snow, spring flowers.
Every season shows off something new You made.
Thank You for making each of us wonderfully, on purpose, one of a kind.
Help us believe we are Your masterpiece.
God, my favorite thing You made is ______.
Thank You for making people the most special creation of all.
togetherLine: The whole earth is full of Your glory! Amen.

title: A Prayer of Praise
lines: Dear God, our hearts feel like singing — so this prayer is our song.
Thank You for laughter, music, dancing, and happy surprises.
You invented every good thing we love.
Angels praise You, oceans roar for You, and little kids sing to You.
We join the big song right now!
God, You are so ______! We praise You!
Let our family's laughter be a kind of thank-You to You.
togetherLine: The joy of the Lord is our strength! Amen.

title: Help Us Wait Well
lines: Dear God, You are never in a hurry, and You are never late.
When little things bug us, help us take a deep breath.
Help us answer gently instead of loudly.
Thank You for being patient with us when we make the same mistake again.
Help us be that patient with each other.
God, help me be patient with ______.
Help us give each other time to grow, the way You give us time.
togetherLine: Your timing is always right! Amen.

title: Peace for Tonight
lines: Dear God, You give peace the world cannot give. We would like some, please.
In peace we will lie down and sleep, for You keep us safe.
Thank You for staying awake so we do not have to.
Thank You for Sabbath moments — for naps, slow mornings, and quiet walks.
Teach our busy family how to truly rest.
God, I am handing You this busy thought: ______.
When the world feels loud, be our quiet place.
togetherLine: You keep us safe, tonight and always! Amen.

title: Use Us, God
lines: Dear God, thank You for everyone who served us today, seen and unseen.
Make us cheerful givers, not grumpy ones.
Help us share our things, our time, and our smiles.
Even small hands can do big things with You.
Use our little gifts to make someone's day better.
God, I could help ______ this week.
Let everything we do, big or small, be done with love.
togetherLine: Serve one another in love! Amen.

title: Thank You, Father
lines: Thank You, God, for being so good to our family.
You give us everything we have: every breath, every meal, every hug.
Help us notice Your gifts all day long, even the tiny ones.
Thank You for our home, our food, and the people sitting beside us.
Thank You for the little things too — warm blankets, funny jokes, and good books.
Thank You, God, for making ______, which makes me smile.
Make our family quick to notice gifts and quick to share them.
togetherLine: Every good gift comes from You! Amen.

title: Our Family Team
lines: Thank You, God, for giving us each other.
When we argue, help us make up quickly.
Teach us to say "I'm sorry" and "I forgive you" like we really mean it.
Help us to be patient with each other, even on grumpy days.
Make our home a place full of kind words and big laughs.
God, please help our family with ______.
Let everyone who visits our home feel Your love inside it.
togetherLine: Love lives here, because You live here! Amen.

title: Clean Hearts
lines: God of fresh starts, here we are again, and You are glad to see us.
You throw our sins as far as the east is from the west.
Help us believe we are really, truly forgiven.
We are sorry for the unkind words and the selfish moments.
Thank You for never turning us away when we say sorry.
God, help me forgive ______ the way You forgive me.
When someone says sorry to us, help us forgive them fast.
togetherLine: Your mercy is new every morning! Amen.

title: Not Alone Today
lines: God, You hold our hands when the path feels dark. Thank You.
You were with David facing the giant and Daniel in the lions' den.
You are the very same God with us today.
When we feel small, remind us how big You are.
When we feel alone, remind us You never leave.
God, I feel nervous about ______. Hold my hand through it.
Help us do it scared when we have to — because You are there.
togetherLine: God is bigger! Amen.

title: Kindness Like Jesus
lines: God of kindness, fill us up so kindness spills out of us.
Help our words be sweet like honey, not sharp like sticks.
Help us build people up, never tear them down.
Give us eyes that notice when someone is sad or left out.
Give us feet that walk over and hearts that care.
God, thank You for the kindness ______ showed me.
Let one act of our kindness start a whole chain of it.
togetherLine: Love is something we do! Amen.

title: Hearts for the Hurting
lines: God, You hear every cry in every country. Hear our prayer for others now.
We pray for people who are sick, and the doctors and nurses caring for them.
Bring healing, comfort, and hope.
We pray for kids who are hungry, lonely, or scared tonight.
Send them helpers, and make us helpers too.
God, please help the people who are ______.
Remind us that helping one person matters, even when we cannot help everyone.
togetherLine: Use our family to share Your love! Amen.

title: You've Got Us, God
lines: God, You have taken care of us every day so far. We trust You with the next one.
Help us trust You with the big things and the little things.
Nothing is too hard for You, and nothing is too small for You.
When we worry, remind us to pray instead.
Trade our heavy worries for Your light peace.
God, help me trust You with ______.
Help us remember all the times You came through before.
togetherLine: You take care of us — always have, always will! Amen.

title: Help Us Learn
lines: God of all wisdom, thank You for teachers and books and questions.
When learning feels hard, help us keep going and not give up.
Remind us that every mistake is a step toward learning.
Bless our teachers and helpers — give them patience and joy.
Help us listen well and try our best.
Thank You for my teacher or helper, ______.
When tests and big days come, give us calm hearts and clear minds.
togetherLine: All wisdom comes from You! Amen.

title: Good Friends, Good Hearts
lines: God, even Jesus had close friends. Thank You for ours.
Help us be the kind of friend who is loyal and true.
Quick to share, quick to cheer, quick to forgive.
Bless our friends tonight, at their own houses, with their own families.
Keep them safe and let them know You love them.
God, please bless ______ tonight in a special way.
Heal any friendships that are hurting right now.
togetherLine: Help us love our friends like You love us! Amen.

title: What a World You Made!
lines: Father, thank You for sunshine and rain, tall trees and tiny seeds.
Thank You for seasons: summer splashing, autumn leaves, winter snow, spring flowers.
Every season shows off something new You made.
Thank You for animals — the fast ones, the fluffy ones, the funny ones.
You must have smiled when You made them.
Thank You for making ______ — it shows how creative You are!
Help us remember that everything beautiful points back to You.
togetherLine: What a wonderful world You made! Amen.

title: Singing to God
lines: God of joy, thank You for making hearts that can be happy.
Thank You for laughter, music, dancing, and happy surprises.
You invented every good thing we love.
You are good all the time — morning, noon, and night.
Nothing and nobody is greater than You.
Something that made me joyful today was ______. Thank You!
Teach us to praise You in the sunshine and in the rain.
togetherLine: We praise You, God! Amen.

title: Patient Hearts
lines: God, today we practice slowing down with You.
When little things bug us, help us take a deep breath.
Help us answer gently instead of loudly.
Help us be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to get angry.
Put a little pause between our feelings and our words.
God, waiting for ______ is hard. Help me wait well.
Grow patience in our family like a strong, slow tree.
togetherLine: Grow patience in us, God! Amen.

title: Rest in You
lines: God of peace, quiet our hearts the way You quiet the sea.
In peace we will lie down and sleep, for You keep us safe.
Thank You for staying awake so we do not have to.
Take the busy thoughts, the leftover worries, and the big feelings of today.
We hand them all to You.
God, bring Your peace to ______.
Help our home stay a calm and gentle place this week.
togetherLine: Your peace guards our hearts! Amen.

title: Ready to Serve
lines: God, You gave every person in this family a gift. Help us give it away.
Make us cheerful givers, not grumpy ones.
Help us share our things, our time, and our smiles.
Show us the people around us who need a hand.
Neighbors, classmates, grandparents, strangers — anyone You choose.
God, one thing I can share is ______.
Help us serve the people in this family first and best.
togetherLine: Our hands are Yours! Amen.

title: A Thank-You Prayer
lines: Dear God, thank You for this day You made just for us.
Some days we forget how much You give us.
Open our eyes to see Your goodness everywhere we look.
Every good gift comes from You, Father.
Thank You for loving us before we even knew how to say thank You.
God, thank You for putting ______ in my life.
Make our family quick to notice gifts and quick to share them.
togetherLine: Thank You, God, for everything! Amen.

title: A Prayer for Our Family
lines: Dear God, thank You for our family — the one You put together on purpose.
Watch over the family we love who are far away, too.
Keep us close to each other and close to You.
Make our family a team that helps each other.
When one of us is sad, help the rest of us be the comfort.
One thing I love about our family is ______.
Let everyone who visits our home feel Your love inside it.
togetherLine: As for our family, we will serve the Lord! Amen.

title: A Fresh-Start Prayer
lines: Dear God, thank You for forgiving us every single time we ask.
Sometimes it is hard to forgive other people.
Make our hearts soft and quick to let go of hurts.
Thank You for Jesus, who makes forgiveness possible.
Help us forgive each other the way You forgive us.
God, help me say sorry to ______ tomorrow.
When someone says sorry to us, help us forgive them fast.
